2606.07697.title: TianJi-Environ: An Autonomous AI Scientist for Atmospheric Environmental Research
2606.07697.paper_summary: As atmospheric environmental prediction continues to improve, interpretable validation of pollution mechanisms and feedback processes has become a main challenge in atmospheric chemistry. Yet mechanism validation based on complex numerical models still relies heavily on expert knowledge: mechanistic hypotheses must be operationalized into executable experiments, and model outputs must be organized into traceable evidence. We present TianJi-Environ, an auditable AI Scientist for atmospheric-chemistry mechanism validation. TianJi-Environ establishes the first WRF-Chem-based multi-agent framework that autonomously drives complex atmospheric-chemistry simulations, converting mechanistic hypotheses into executable configurations, testing experiments, and evidence criteria. Using ozone response and particulate-matter feedback as two representative examples, we demonstrate TianJi-Environ's capability for mechanism validation. In a summertime ozone case over the North China Plain, the system detects directionally consistent aerosol-radiation-interaction signals in shortwave radiation and boundary-layer height, but judges the evidence for ozone response to NOx control to be incomplete. In a wintertime PM2.5 case over the Guanzhong Basin, it localizes the unsupported link to insufficient propagation from black-carbon perturbation to particulate response and missing diagnostics of vertical absorptive heating. These results show that TianJi-Environ makes expert-driven mechanism validation explicit, structured, and auditable, offering a reproducible paradigm for multi-agent systems coupled with complex atmospheric-chemistry models.
2606.07697.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大氣環境預測的不斷改善，污染機制和反饋過程的可解釋性驗證已成為大氣化學中的一個主要挑戰。然而，基於複雜數值模型的機制驗證仍然在很大程度上依賴於專家知識：機制假設必須轉化為可執行的實驗，模型輸出必須組織成可追溯的證據。我們提出了 TianJi-Environ，一個可審計的 AI 科學家，用於大氣化學機制驗證。TianJi-Environ 建立了第一個基於 WRF-Chem 的多代理框架，自主驅動複雜的大氣化學模擬，將機制假設轉化為可執行的配置、測試實驗和證據標準。以臭氧反應和顆粒物反饋作為兩個代表性例子，我們展示了 TianJi-Environ 在機制驗證方面的能力。在北中國平原的夏季臭氧案例中，系統檢測到短波輻射和邊界層高度中的方向一致的氣溶膠-輻射-相互作用信號，但認為對 NOx 控制的臭氧反應的證據不完整。在關中盆地的冬季 PM2.5 案例中，它將不支持的鏈接定位為黑碳擾動到顆粒反應的傳播不足，以及缺少垂直吸收加熱的診斷。這些結果表明，TianJi-Environ 使專家驅動的機制驗證變得明確、結構化且可審計，為與複雜大氣化學模型耦合的多代理系統提供了一個可重複的範式。
2606.07697.author: Haoluo Zhao et.al.
2606.07697.authors: Haoluo Zhao, Hongchun Zhang, Nan Li, Jing-Jia Luo, Kaikai Zhang, Mengyang Yu, Nan Chen, Tao Song, Fan Meng
